notes: Polished snake implementation with smooth interpolation, countdown, death animation, bonus items, speed progression, demo mode, and audio — minor issue is grid is 20x20 cells at 31px each totaling 620px which fits perfectly, but the snake head direction snap on turn feels slightly abrupt; overall a high-quality build.
Core logic and controls are flawless, but the smooth movement implementation is flawed, causing a pulsating caterpillar effect and flashing segment colors.
Core snake gameplay, pause, countdown, scoring, and game-over flow are implemented well, but bonus/hi-score edge logic and some state timing polish issues keep it from feeling fully flawless.
